message:
fix: address linter warnings and API changes from dependency update

Small fixes discovered after the dependency update:

- core/skill.rs: Remove unused SKILL_SPEC_FORMAT_VERSION constant
  (SkillSpec::FORMAT_VERSION is used instead)

- suggestions/bandit/bandit.rs: Update rand API usage
  - rand::thread_rng() renamed to rand::rng() in newer versions

- sync/engine.rs: Add missing path field to SkillSnapshot
  - Required for sync operations to track skill file locations

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
